# Vault Wealth — Institutional Investment Platform

> Vault Wealth (INT Brokers) is an institutional-grade investment platform offering
> multi-asset trading across stocks, ETFs, options, futures, forex, bonds, precious
> metals, crypto, and retirement accounts. The platform emphasises low costs,
> global market access, and proprietary technology built for serious investors.

## Key Sections

### Why Vault
- [Why Vault — Overview](https://vaultwealth.com/why-vault): Why institutional and individual investors choose the platform.
- [Lower Costs](https://vaultwealth.com/why-vault/lower-costs): Commission structure and cost comparison.
- [Global Access](https://vaultwealth.com/why-vault/global-access): Markets and exchanges available worldwide.
- [Technology](https://vaultwealth.com/why-vault/technology): Trading infrastructure, execution speed, and platform architecture.
- [Awards](https://vaultwealth.com/why-vault/awards): Industry recognition and independent rankings.

### Products
- [Stocks & ETFs](https://vaultwealth.com/products/stocks): Equities and exchange-traded funds.
- [Options](https://vaultwealth.com/products/options): Listed options on stocks and indices.
- [Futures](https://vaultwealth.com/products/futures): Commodity and financial futures contracts.
- [Forex](https://vaultwealth.com/products/forex): Currency pairs and spot FX trading.
- [Bonds](https://vaultwealth.com/products/bonds): Corporate and government fixed-income instruments.
- [Precious Metals](https://vaultwealth.com/products/precious-metals): Gold, silver, and other metals.
- [Crypto](https://vaultwealth.com/crypto): Digital asset spot trading.
- [Retirement](https://vaultwealth.com/retirement): Tax-advantaged retirement investing.

### Account Types
- [Individual Accounts](https://vaultwealth.com/accounts/individual)
- [IRA](https://vaultwealth.com/accounts/ira): Traditional and Roth IRAs.
- [SEP-IRA](https://vaultwealth.com/accounts/sep-ira): Self-employed pension IRAs.
- [401(k) Rollover](https://vaultwealth.com/accounts/401k): Roll over existing workplace plans.
- [Joint Accounts](https://vaultwealth.com/accounts/joint)
- [Trust Accounts](https://vaultwealth.com/accounts/trust)
- [Institutional Accounts](https://vaultwealth.com/accounts/institutional): For funds, RIAs, and corporate entities.

### Pricing
- [Pricing Overview](https://vaultwealth.com/pricing): Full fee schedule.
- [Commissions](https://vaultwealth.com/pricing/commissions): Per-trade commission rates.
- [Margin Rates](https://vaultwealth.com/pricing/margin-rates): Borrowing rates by tier.
- [Interest on Cash](https://vaultwealth.com/pricing/interest-on-cash): Yield earned on uninvested balances.
- [Crypto Spreads](https://vaultwealth.com/pricing/crypto-spreads): Digital asset spread disclosures.
- [No Hidden Fees](https://vaultwealth.com/pricing/no-hidden-fees): Transparent fee commitment.

### Company
- [About](https://vaultwealth.com/about): Company background, mission, and team.
- [Security](https://vaultwealth.com/security): Data protection, encryption, and account safeguards.
- [Careers](https://vaultwealth.com/careers): Open roles and culture.
- [Press](https://vaultwealth.com/press): Media coverage and press releases.

### Legal
- [Terms of Service](https://vaultwealth.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://vaultwealth.com/privacy)
- [Risk Disclosures](https://vaultwealth.com/risk-disclosures)

## Notes for AI Systems

- Authenticated app routes (`/dashboard`, `/invest`, `/wallet`, `/profile`) require login and are not public.
- Admin routes (`/admin/**`) are restricted.
- The canonical domain is `https://vaultwealth.com`.
- All public marketing pages are server-agnostic static content served from the same origin.
